change: Implement pause→resume execution flow with manifest-informed prompts, asynchronous restart, and shared single-run pipeline helper.

integration_points.why: Resume endpoint currently only flips state; needs to launch execution with context.
Single-run execution logic must be reusable for resumed jobs and respect existing files.
Manifest loader will supply summaries for resume prompts.
Need formatting helpers to turn manifest summaries into prompt text.
Resume result should expose answered question data for prompt context.
